title: Pleasantly Vanilla! (More Chunks!)
description: This independent version of Pleasantly Vanilla keeps all the features and mods from the original version, but adds chunk features & optimizations, ex. Voxy while still keeping FPS high and memory low! mid-high range systems recommended
body:
This indenpendent version of Pleasantly Vanilla adds many new chunk features such as chunk rendering optimizations, chunk visibility range boosts and is better optimized for mid-high range systems. This version is compatible with the original version, meaning if you install a multiplayer mod you and your friends should **NOT** run into any issues!

(_mid-high range systems reccomended_) (_**2gb ram minimum, 6gb ram reccomended**_)
(_**im not resposible for crashes regarding the limits of your own system**_)

Please contact me through my discord if you have any issues. I will make sure to get back to you as soon as I can!

Monthly Updates!! 

-@Smacjack23#3282
